V-Vegetarian | Vg -Vegan | GF- Not containing gluten / DF - Not containing dairy All of our food is freshly made on the premises. At busy times,
there may be a wait on food. All our food is prepared in a kitchen where nuts, gluten and other allergens are present. Our menu does not display
all ingredients. If you have a food allergy or intolerance, please let us know before ordering. Full allergen information for food is available upon
request. For parties of 10 or more, there will be an additional 10% service charge added to the bill.
